$comment: Canon Knowledge Production V1 — foundational domains. STATE: empty / Unknown. No facts have been produced because the canonical source text (หลักมหาภูต, ส. หยกฟ้า) is not present in the repository (see knowledge/canon/sources/mahabhut/README.md). Per the Canon rules, facts are NEVER invented from memory or the internet — unsupported knowledge stays Unknown. When the source arrives, units are produced ONLY through the Knowledge Extraction Workspace (canon/workspace/), resolved against the Canonical Ontology (canon/ontology/), and imported after review.
